reviews.comment:
Miy buena atencion. Los chicos q atienden una maravilla. Tendrian q ver con Ingenieros Viales. Para brindar mas comodidad y seguridad para entrar y salir de dicha Edtacion de Servicio q esta sobre ruta y a la entrada y salida mediante una Rotonda a Sta. Clara. Ruta 11.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. The guys who provide service are wonderful. They should contact Highway Engineers. To provide more comfort and safety when entering and exiting the Service Station, which is located on the highway and at the entrance and exit through a roundabout to Santa Clara, Route 11.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2bl92UFVREAE

reviews.comment:
Maso, 2 playeros para tanta cantidad de autos, mínimo 25 minutos perdidos!

(Translated by Google)
With only two attendants for so many cars, at least 25 minutes wasted!

reviews.comment:
En horas pico de temporada, incluso en baja temporada, siempre hay colas, deberían agregar surtidores y mas personal. Lindo parque recreativo de socios y para acampar!

(Translated by Google)
During peak season, and even in the off-season, there are always lines; they should add more pumps and more staff. Nice recreational park for members and for camping!
